actions.instruction: Make two French knots for the eyes
actions.sourceText: Make two French knots for the eyes.

actions.instruction: Use pink yarn to stitch the blushes just below the eyes for a finished look
actions.sourceText: Then, use pink yarn to stitch the blushes just below the eyes for a finished look.

sourceText: Make two French knots for the eyes. Then, use pink yarn to stitch the blushes just below the eyes for a finished look.
title: Eyes & Blushes
